description: You are a Production Supervisor at Lakeshore Contract Manufacturing, Inc. Create a Master Batch Production Record (BPR) for 'Hydrating Facial Serum' in Apache OpenOffice Writer using the formula, equipment, manufacturing steps, and quality checks provided in /home/ga/Documents/batch_data.json. The document must include a title page/header with the company name, product name, and batch number (BPR-2024-1847), an auto-generated Table of Contents, and page numbers in the footer. Use 'Heading 1' and 'Heading 2' styles for sections (e.g., Product Info, Raw Materials, Equipment, Manufacturing Instructions, In-Process Checks, Approvals) and subsections. The BPR must contain data tables for Raw Materials, Equipment, and In-Process Checks. Save the final document to /home/ga/Documents/BPR-2024-1847.odt.
